title: Revenue Retention
ask_prompt: My revenue retention metrics: Avg gross retention {retention}%, avg churn {churn}%, net revenue retention {nrr}%. Monthly revenue at risk from churn: {atRisk}. Churn trend: {trend}. What strategies can reduce my revenue churn?
revenue_at_risk_desc: Estimated monthly revenue lost to churn
net_shrinking_value: Expansion revenue doesn’t cover churn — focus on upselling existing customers
strong_expansion_value: {nrr}% NRR — existing customers are growing their spend
concentration_risk: Concentration risk: {n}% of revenue from one channel
